summary.honest_note: Strong documentation and lab design; NOT production-ready. No real enterprise telemetry, no rules tuned against real environment noise, and no operating cadence running yet. Every dimension below is documented and lab-exercised, not operated in a production tenant.

dimensions.reason: Synthetic-to-real telemetry mappings, required-field analysis, and an ingestion inventory exist for all 8 source types, but no real ingestion or field validation against a tenant.
dimensions.gap_to_close: Connect real log sources, validate schemas/fields, and confirm coverage against live volume.

dimensions.reason: Connector runbooks, a validation checklist, and a health-dashboard spec are documented, but no connectors are live and no ingestion health is being measured.
dimensions.gap_to_close: Deploy and validate connectors, run the health dashboard, and confirm freshness/latency SLAs.

dimensions.reason: 15 detections exist as code (KQL + YAML + tested Python mirrors) with MITRE mapping and a quality scorecard (avg 91.8/100 metadata), but none are tuned against real noise; all sit at Draft/Simulated.
dimensions.gap_to_close: Run rules in audit mode against real telemetry, tune false positives, and advance promotion states with evidence.

dimensions.reason: A full IR operating model, severity model, comms templates, RCA process, and lifecycle states are documented and exercised via the CP-INC-2001 tabletop, but not on real incidents.
dimensions.gap_to_close: Run real incidents through the process, measure MTTD/MTTR against SLAs, and refine from post-incident reviews.

dimensions.reason: Strong automate-vs-approve guardrails, an approval process, a test plan, and a safety checklist exist; the one live Logic App is deployed disabled with no connectors or secrets.
dimensions.gap_to_close: Build and lab-test real Logic Apps with approval gates and snapshots, then approve through change control before enabling.

dimensions.reason: A change-approval model, risk matrix, sample change record, and rollback template are documented and the detection-as-code pipeline enforces review/test, but no change board is operating.
dimensions.gap_to_close: Operate change control on real changes with real approvers and post-change monitoring.

dimensions.reason: A least-privilege RBAC matrix, review model, checklist, and fictional sample assignments exist, but no real assignments, no separation-of-duties enforcement, and no access reviews running.
dimensions.gap_to_close: Apply least-privilege roles to real identities, enforce separation of duties, and run periodic access reviews with break-glass auditing.

dimensions.reason: A cost model, ingestion budget, retention policy, and monitoring queries are documented with illustrative numbers, but there is no real ingestion volume to govern.
dimensions.gap_to_close: Measure real ingestion, set real budgets/alerts, apply table-level retention/archive, and run the daily/monthly cost review.

dimensions.reason: A DRI rotation model, escalation matrix, handover template, and a CP-INC-2001 page simulation are documented, but the rota is not staffed or paging-integrated.
dimensions.gap_to_close: Staff the rotation, integrate paging with SLAs, and run recurring page simulations and real on-call.

dimensions.reason: An owner register, monthly/quarterly review cadences, and a deprecation process are documented, but the cadence is not yet running and reviews have not occurred on real data.
dimensions.gap_to_close: Run the monthly/quarterly reviews, keep the owner register live, and operate versioning/deprecation on real rules.
